languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

languages.text: "Я уже и забыл, как выглядят результаты странствий настоящего Вольного Торговца. Целый новый мир в управлении династии фон Валанциус... Работы прибавится".
"I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."
languages.original_text: "Я уже и забыл, как выглядят результаты странствий настоящего Вольного Торговца. Целый новый мир в управлении династии фон Валанциус... Работы прибавится".

traits.locale_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."
"I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."
"I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

languages.text: 「真のローグトレーダーの放浪の果ての姿は、もう忘れていた。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の支配する、全く新しい世界だ。我々は、大変な仕事に就くことになるだろう」
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: 「真のローグトレーダーの放浪の果ての姿は、もう忘れていた。フォン・ヴァランキウス家の支配する、全く新しい世界だ。我々は、大変な仕事に就くことになるだろう。」

languages.text: « J'avais déjà oublié à quoi ressemblent les fruits des pérégrinations d'un véritable libre-marchand. Un tout nouveau monde gouverné par la dynastie von Valancius... Nous allons devoir nous retrousser les manches. »
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: « J'avais déjà oublié à quoi ressemblent les fruits des pérégrinations d'un véritable libre-marchand. Un tout nouveau monde gouverné par la dynastie von Valancius... Nous allons devoir nous retrousser les manches. »

languages.text: "Ich hatte schon vergessen, wie die Früchte der Arbeit {mf|eines wahren Freihändlers|einer wahren Freihändlerin} aussehen. Eine völlig neue Welt unter der Herrschaft der Dynastie derer von Valancius ... Wir werden viel Arbeit haben."
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hatte schon vergessen, wie die Früchte der Arbeit {mf|eines wahren Freihändlers|einer wahren Freihändlerin} aussehen. Eine völlig neue Welt unter der Herrschaft der Dynastie derer von Valancius ... Wir werden viel Arbeit haben."

languages.text: "Gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in gezintilerinin meyvelerinin neye benzediğini çoktan unutmuştum. Von Valancius hanedanlığınca yönetilen yepyeni bir dünya... Yapacak çok işimiz olacak."
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçek bir Hür Tacir'in gezintilerinin meyvelerinin neye benzediğini çoktan unutmuştum. Von Valancius hanedanlığınca yönetilen yepyeni bir dünya... Yapacak çok işimiz olacak."

languages.text: «Ya había olvidado los frutos de las actividades de un auténtico Comerciante Independiente. Un nuevo mundo gobernado por la dinastía von Valancius... Nos queda mucho trabajo por delante».
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: «Ya había olvidado los frutos de las actividades de un auténtico Comerciante Independiente. Un nuevo mundo gobernado por la dinastía von Valancius... Nos queda mucho trabajo por delante».

languages.text: “我都快忘了真正的行商浪人的探索会结出怎样的果实了。一整个由冯·瓦兰修斯王朝统治的新世界……这下我们可有的忙了。”
languages.original_text: "I had already forgotten what the fruits of a true Rogue Trader's wanderings look like. A whole new world ruled by the von Valancius dynasty... We will have our work cut out."

traits.locale_text: “我都快忘了真正的行商浪人的探索会结出怎样的果实了。一整个由冯·瓦兰修斯王朝统治的新世界……这下我们可有的忙了。”
